title: Century Casinos, Inc. Announces First Quarter 2026 Results
author: Century Casinos, Inc.
description: Century Casinos reported record first quarter 2026 net operating revenue of $137.2 million, up 5% year-over-year, with earnings from operations increasing 65% to $11.8 million. Adjusted EBITDAR grew 24% to $24.9 million, driven by strong performance across North American properties. However, the company reported a net loss of $16.5 million, though improved from the prior year loss of $20.6 million. Cash decreased to $60.0 million from $68.9 million at year-end 2025.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Company achieved all-time record first quarter net operating revenue of $137.2 million with 5% growth, 65% increase in earnings from operations, and 24% growth in Adjusted EBITDAR. All North American properties outperformed prior year, with particularly strong results at the Nugget property showing 93% Adjusted EBITDAR increase. Net loss improved 20% year-over-year despite continued losses.

title: Century Casinos Announces Rescheduled Dates of Third Quarter 2025 Earnings Release and Conference Call
author: Prnewswire
description: Century Casinos postponed its Q3 2025 earnings release to November 10, 2025, to complete review procedures and financial valuations for its Rocky Gap reporting unit. The earnings conference call will be held on November 11, 2025.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company is transparently communicating a delay in earnings release for thorough financial review, which suggests responsible financial management but may raise mild investor concerns about potential underlying issues

title: Century Casinos Announces Rocky Gap Casino, Resort & Golf Honored with Multiple Accolades in Casino Player Magazine's 'Best of Gaming Awards 2025: Maryland'
author: Prnewswire
description: Century Casinos' Rocky Gap Casino, Resort & Golf has been honored with multiple first-place awards in Casino Player Magazine's Best of Gaming Awards 2025, recognizing excellence in categories like Best Hotel Staff, Best Rooms, and Best Golf Course.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company received multiple prestigious awards for its Rocky Gap Casino, highlighting its high-quality service, amenities, and guest experience across various categories

title: Century Casinos Announces Rocky Gap Casino, Resort & Golf Honored with Multiple Accolades in Casino Player Magazine's 'The Best of Dining & Nightlife Awards 2025'
author: Prnewswire
description: Century Casinos' Rocky Gap Casino, Resort & Golf in Maryland received multiple first-place awards in Casino Player Magazine's Best of Dining & Nightlife Awards 2025, recognizing the resort's exceptional service and experiences.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article highlights the multiple awards won by Century Casinos' Rocky Gap Casino, Resort & Golf, indicating the company's success in providing exceptional service and experiences to its guests.

title: Century Casinos Announces Dates of Fourth Quarter and Year End 2024 Earnings Release and Conference Call
author: Prnewswire
description: Century Casinos, Inc. announced the release of its Q4 2024 and year-end 2024 earnings on March 13, 2025, and a conference call to discuss the results.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article is a routine announcement of the company's upcoming earnings release and conference call, which is a normal part of the company's operations.
